query: UPDATE background_jobs SET status = 'error', error = 'Timeout: processo excedeu o tempo limite' WHERE status = 'processing';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute UPDATE background_jobs SET status = 'error', error = 'Timeout: processo excedeu o tempo limite' WHERE status = 'processing';
